heading: Fees of recorders in Alaska for filing proofs of work and improvements
label: 49f Fees of recorders in Alaska for filing proofs of work and improvements
text: The recorders for the several divisions or districts of Alaska shall collect the sum of $1.50 as a fee for the filing, recording, and indexing annual proofs of work and improvements for each claim so recorded under the provisions of .section 49e of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 385 of Title 48
